data.name: User Trust: Security Product - Report Scam
data.description: This domain stores app-collected user scam reports—incidents in or outside MoMo—with basic context (scenario, channel), loss signals, review status, ... linked to the reporting MoMo user and, when applicable, related MoMo transactions, to support case handling and power Check-Scam features.
